Don't Starve: Wilderness Survival

You are Wilson, a scientist trapped in a mysterious wilderness. Survive by gathering resources (berries, wood, stone) and crafting tools to hunt rabbits for meat. Manage your hunger meter - if it reaches zero, you die. At night, stay near your campfire or darkness will consume you. Craft better tools to gather resources faster and survive long enough to find the mysterious portal that leads home. Can you survive 5 full day-night cycles and escape?

Controls: Arrow Keys: Move | Space: Gather resources/Hunt rabbits | Z: Craft tools | Shift: Light/fuel campfire | 1: Eat berries | 2: Eat meat | Enter: Start | Esc: Pause | R: Restart

You play as Wilson, an intrepid Gentleman Scientist who has been trapped by a demon and transported to a mysterious wilderness world. Wilson must learn to exploit his environment and its inhabitants if he ever hopes to escape and find his way back home.

Enter a strange and unexplored world full of strange creatures, dangers, and surprises. Gather resources to craft items and structures that match your survival style. Play your way as you unravel the mysteries of this strange land.

Key Features:

  • Uncompromising Survival & World Exploration:

    No instructions. No help. No hand holding. Start with nothing and craft, hunt, research, farm and fight to survive.

  • Dark and Whimsical Visuals:

    2D characters and odd creatures inhabiting a unique 3D world.

  • Randomly Generated New Worlds:

    Want a new map? No problem! At any time you can generate a new living and breathing world that hates you and wants you to die.

Don't Starve: Wilderness Survival

You are Wilson, a scientist trapped in a mysterious wilderness. Survive by gathering resources (berries, wood, stone) and crafting tools to hunt rabbits for meat. Manage your hunger meter - if it reaches zero, you die. At night, stay near your campfire or darkness will consume you. Craft better tools to gather resources faster and survive long enough to find the mysterious portal that leads home. Can you survive 5 full day-night cycles and escape?

Controls: Arrow Keys: Move | Space: Gather resources/Hunt rabbits | Z: Craft tools | Shift: Light/fuel campfire | 1: Eat berries | 2: Eat meat | Enter: Start | Esc: Pause | R: Restart

test_5_ModeBtn.strategy_description: Gather wood during the day. Wait for night to fall. Test being away from campfire (should take damage). Light campfire and stay near it (should be safe). Add wood to maintain fire.
test_5_ModeBtn.expected_outcome: Player takes damage in darkness when away from lit campfire. Player is safe when near lit campfire. Campfire fuel depletes over time and can be refilled with wood. Day-night cycle progresses correctly.
